{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165439C1CF34BFBFD902E5C609"}"},"total":213},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7396000009628320537","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大汉帝国全史不仅记述了整个汉朝的重大事件，对于引发重大事件的引子也作了描述，语言通俗易懂，让人能了解大汉四百余年的历史，非常好的一部书！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722024014,"group_id":"7277787402767174656","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看书写作，对文学的爱好从未减弱","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N061Ix64aghAMLBbpD0xV9yecn24yzyZkfrjBlkR6kj3","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/64e62ef16cad49889fcd2930891e7f9a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528516&x-signature=%2FbXqRtn8dIbSrSA%2B8e3ADwDXDi8%3D","user_id":"4051041405899224","user_name":"大陆岛的北子熤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4051041405899224","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7277787402767174656","book_info":{"abstract":"继《明朝那些事儿》之后，又一部通俗说史大书！
一部有趣有料又严谨的汉朝历史普及读物。
巍巍大汉400年，影响后世2000年！为什么汉朝能划定此后2000年间中国政治与文化的疆界？
促统一！抓经济！搞开放！重民生！搞科技！文景之治、丝绸之路、造纸术、《九章算术》和《史记》，数个第一！
本书是一部汉朝历史普及读物，一共5册，分别为：1、亡秦灭楚，2、文景与汉武，3、昭宣中兴与王莽篡汉，4、东汉开国与光武中兴，5、东汉与蜀汉。
从“刘邦起于草莽”讲起，一直讲到“诸葛亮辅佐蜀汉败落”为止，透过皇帝、权臣、将领、文人、后妃、外敌等超过200多个人物和发生在他们身上的上百段故事，看懂中国第一个横跨亚欧大帝国从强盛走向袁落的470年。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0706dbcd514f45bec8947a6dcc9de993~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"上医治国","author_id":"","book_id":"7277787402767174656","book_name":"大汉帝国全史（全5册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e088","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"32.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":402,"name":"中国历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402&name=中国历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7277788302290193408","read_count":"7429","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"864561"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"64","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0706dbcd514f45bec8947a6dcc9de993~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180879&x-signature=hcoLENBb86RjSmnDcrTT5TtDc4U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165439C1CF34BFBFD902E5C609"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3607},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7369891041257718590","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"基于史料，行文流畅幽默，适合现代人读汉史的一部好书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715939179,"group_id":"7277787402767174656","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+yp00rrnvkBBg4zdKpEqUg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ac12f9ed74c946aea842ba40e0eed371~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536808&x-signature=oOYFBZK%2BsYCv3OfwSB%2FZ6int1yU%3D","user_id":"4589095107","user_name":"智水仁山"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4589095107","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7277787402767174656","book_info":{"abstract":"继《明朝那些事儿》之后，又一部通俗说史大书！
一部有趣有料又严谨的汉朝历史普及读物。
巍巍大汉400年，影响后世2000年！为什么汉朝能划定此后2000年间中国政治与文化的疆界？
促统一！抓经济！搞开放！重民生！搞科技！文景之治、丝绸之路、造纸术、《九章算术》和《史记》，数个第一！
本书是一部汉朝历史普及读物，一共5册，分别为：1、亡秦灭楚，2、文景与汉武，3、昭宣中兴与王莽篡汉，4、东汉开国与光武中兴，5、东汉与蜀汉。
从“刘邦起于草莽”讲起，一直讲到“诸葛亮辅佐蜀汉败落”为止，透过皇帝、权臣、将领、文人、后妃、外敌等超过200多个人物和发生在他们身上的上百段故事，看懂中国第一个横跨亚欧大帝国从强盛走向袁落的470年。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0706dbcd514f45bec8947a6dcc9de993~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"上医治国","author_id":"","book_id":"7277787402767174656","book_name":"大汉帝国全史（全5册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e088","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"32.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":402,"name":"中国历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402&name=中国历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7277788302290193408","read_count":"7429","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"864561"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"64","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0706dbcd514f45bec8947a6dcc9de993~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180879&x-signature=hcoLENBb86RjSmnDcrTT5TtDc4U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"70"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165439C1CF34BFBFD902E5C609"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":55644,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":76483,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7985},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7457956083880624921","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的内容丰富而详尽。从西汉的开创，到大汉帝国的鼎盛，再到东汉的衰落，史杰鹏先生以宏大的历史视角，为我们描绘了一个立体的大汉帝国。他不仅关注政治、军事，更深入探讨了经济、文化、科技等各个方面，让我们对那个时代有了更加全面的了解。
读完这本书后，我深受震撼。大汉帝国那个辉煌的时代，仿佛就在我们眼前重现。那个时代的英雄人物，他们的智慧、勇气和豪情壮志，都让我们为之赞叹。同时，我也深感惋惜，那个辉煌的时代已经一去不复返了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736448976,"group_id":"7277787402767174656","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱情 言情 恐怖
